## ❓ Question
What would you like to know about the Retirement Modeler?

## 🔍 Context
Provide context for your question:
- What are you trying to accomplish?
- What have you tried so far?
- Any specific scenario or use case?

## 📚 Documentation Check
- [ ] I've read the README.md
- [ ] I've checked the CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I've searched existing issues
- [ ] I've looked at the code documentation

## 🎯 Specific Area
Which area does your question relate to?
- [ ] General usage / Getting started
- [ ] LunchMoney API integration
- [ ] Financial modeling / calculations
- [ ] User interface / components
- [ ] Development / contributing
- [ ] Deployment / hosting
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## 📎 Additional Information
Add any screenshots, code snippets, or other relevant information that might help answer your question.

## 💭 Expected Answer Type
What kind of answer would be most helpful?
- [ ] Quick explanation
- [ ] Step-by-step guide
- [ ] Code example
- [ ] Reference to documentation
- [ ] Discussion / opinion
